title: CF Event Music Context Contracts
source_policy: Derived from byte-equivalent CF/DC source scaffolds plus the C0:68F4/C0:69AF and EF debug-overlay consumers. This records only the selector, pointer, event-condition, music-track, and transition-SFX fields those consumers read.

event_music_context_pointer_row.consumer: C0:6932 reads CF:58EF + selector*2, masks 0x7FFF, and uses bank CF for the selected context chain

event_music_context_row.consumer: C0:6948 treats zero as the selected default row; otherwise C0:6950 masks 0x7FFF for C2:1628 and bit 15 supplies the expected state
C0:6987 reads this byte into $5DD6 before optional ChangeMusic dispatch
C0:69DC reads this byte from the selected row and sends it through C0:AC0C as an APUIO1 transition cue

current_position_selector_byte.consumer: C0:691E indexes DC:D637 by sector_y*32 + sector_x and masks the byte before indexing CF:58EF
